events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still drumming strong! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic beat?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: From stadium rock to the stars! Happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May. What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and declared 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us! What was the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring hits like "Live Forever" and "Supersonic".

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago today, we lost the King. Remembering Elvis Presley, whose music and legacy live on forever.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55
events.blurb: On the 30th anniversary of his passing, we remember influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty years ago today, the music world lost a legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose powerful lyrics and legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84
events.blurb: On the anniversary of his passing, we pay tribute to guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose electrifying talent changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring the legendary zebra crossing cover, on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock and roll icon, Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and attitude are still as powerful as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock and roll swagger after all these years.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic solo single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, a powerful anthem for peace and unity.

angles.name: Imagine Release Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity is as relevant now as it was then.

events.title: The first Apple iPod unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic spy film franchise.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86
events.blurb: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.
